articles.title: 8 billion tokens a day forced AT&T to rethink AI orchestration — and cut costs by 90%
articles.description:
When your average daily token usage is 8 billion a day, you have a massive scale problem. 

This was the case at AT&T, and chief data officer Andy Markus and his team recognized that it simply wasn’t feasible (or economical) to push everything through large reasoning models. 

So, when building out an internal Ask AT&T personal assistant, they reconstructed the orchestration layer. The result: A multi-agent stack built on LangChain where large language model “super agents” direct smaller, underl
articles.summary: AT&T面临每日80亿次令牌使用的规模挑战，决定采用多代理架构优化数据处理。

articles.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff: This isn’t our first SaaSpocalypse
articles.description: Salesforce reported a solid year-end earnings and then pulled out all the stops to ward off more talk of the death of its business to AI.
articles.summary: Salesforce公布强劲年度财报，并全力应对AI对其业务 demise 的讨论。

articles.title: Nvidia delivers first Vera Rubin AI GPU samples to customers — 88-core Vera CPU paired with Rubin GPUs with 288 GB of HBM4 memory apiece
articles.description: Nvidia begins to ship samples of its Vera Rubin platforms for AI to partners, on track for revenue shipments in the second half of the year.
articles.summary: Nvidia开始向合作伙伴发送Vera Rubin AI平台样品，预计下半年实现营收发货。

articles.title: Gushwork bets on AI search for customer leads — and early results are emerging
articles.description: Gushwork has raised $9 million in a seed round led by SIG and Lightspeed. The startup has seen early customer traction from AI search tools like ChatGPT.
articles.summary: Gushwork完成900万美元种子轮融资，由SIG和Lightspeed领投，早期客户包括ChatGPT等AI搜索工具。

articles.title: Anthropic acquires computer-use AI startup Vercept after Meta poached one of its founders
articles.description: Seattle-based Vercept developed complex agentic tools, including a computer-use agent that could complete tasks inside applications like a person with a laptop would.
articles.summary: 西雅图公司Vercept开发了复杂的代理工具，包括能在应用内像人类一样完成任务的电脑使用代理。

articles.title: New York sues Valve, alleging its loot boxes are ‘quintessential gambling’
articles.description:
New York Attorney General Letitia James is suing Valve for "illegally promoting gambling" through the loot box systems it has built for video games like Counter-Strike 2, Team Fortress 2, and Dota 2, according to a press release. The attorney general seeks to "permanently stop Valve from promoting gambling features in its games, disgorge all ill-gotten gains, and pay fines for violating New York's laws."
"This loot box model that Valve has developed - charging an individual for a chance to win s
articles.summary: 纽约总检察长Letitia James起诉Valve公司，指控其通过游戏中的战利品箱系统“非法推广赌博”，要求永久禁止Valve在游戏内推广赌博功能，并追回非法所得及支付罚款。

articles.title: Nvidia has another record quarter amid record capex spends
articles.description: "The demand for tokens in the world has gone completely exponential," Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said about the company's earnings.
articles.summary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋表示，全球对代币的需求已呈指数级增长。

articles.title: How the new Galaxy S26 phones stack up against each other on paper
articles.description:
Samsung’s Galaxy S26 phones introduce a slate of new AI-powered features, including some new photography tools. | Image: Samsung	

Samsung has just announced its new Galaxy S26 lineup, which includes the S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra. While they aren't radical departures from last year's models, they bring a handful of notable upgrades. All three run on Qualcomm's Galaxy-centric Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, which delivers improved performance and powers a slew of new AI-based features. This includes
articles.summary: 三星Galaxy S26系列推出多项AI新功能，包括摄影工具升级。搭载高通骁龙8 Elite Gen 5芯片，性能提升并支持更多AI特性。

articles.title: Corsair is halting Drop sales after March 25th
articles.description:
The Drop Mythic Journey keyboard from 2022. | Photo by Jon Porter / The Verge	

The Drop store, which was acquired by gaming gear giant Corsair in 2023, was a haven for mechanical keyboard enthusiasts and audiophiles to discover and buy hard-to-find gear - sometimes at surprisingly good prices. The company will cease sales after March 25th at 11:59PM PT, which is also the cut off to redeem Drop Rewards. After March 31st, the site will be accessible for a limited time to view order history, but a
articles.summary: Drop品牌于2023年被Corsair收购，曾是机械键盘和音响爱好者购买稀缺产品的热门平台。2024年3月25日后将停止销售，3月31日后仅限查看订单历史。

articles.title: Roundtables: Why 2026 Is the Year for Sodium-Ion Batteries
articles.description: Listen to the session or watch below Sodium-based batteries could be a cheaper, safer alternative to lithium-ion, and the technology is finally making its way into cars—and energy storage arrays on the grid. Sodium-ion batteries are one of MIT Technology Review’s 10 Breakthrough Technologies of 2026 list, and this subscriber-only discussion explains why. Watch a…
articles.summary: 钠基电池比锂离子电池更便宜、更安全，正逐步应用于汽车和电网储能。MIT将其列为2026年十大突破技术之一。

articles.title: Everyone Speaks Incel Now
articles.description: After migrating from misogynist forums to social media feeds, terms like “looksmaxxing” and “mogged” are now impossible to avoid.
articles.summary: “looksmaxxing”和“mogged”等术语从厌女论坛转移到社交媒体，难以避免。

articles.title: The Peace Corps is recruiting volunteers to sell AI to developing nations
articles.description:
For more than six decades, the Peace Corps has represented itself as an agency focused on helping underserved communities around the globe. But a new initiative, called the "Tech Corps," threatens to unravel the agency's original mission by recruiting de facto Silicon Valley salespeople to promote the biggest names in AI - many of which have ties to President Donald Trump.
Established by President John F. Kennedy in 1961, the Peace Corps recruited skilled Americans interested in assisting develo
articles.summary: 和平队成立60多年来致力于帮助全球弱势群体，但新推出的“科技队”计划可能偏离其初衷，招募硅谷销售人员推广与特朗普有关的AI企业。

articles.title: The White House wants AI companies to cover rate hikes. Most have already said they would.
articles.description: Many hyperscalers have already made public commitments to cover electricity cost increases.
articles.summary: 许多超大规模企业已公开承诺应对电费上涨。

articles.title: Trump claims tech companies will sign deals next week to pay for their own power supply
articles.description: President Donald Trump tried to quell Americans' concerns about rising electricity costs during his State of the Union speech - and now we're learning that the deals he promised could land next week. Trump claimed that he's negotiated a "rate payer protection pledge" with major tech companies, which would see them build out or pay for new electricity generation for their data centers. Leaders from Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, xAI, Oracle and OpenAI are expected to attend a March 4th event to
articles.summary: 特朗普在国情演说中试图缓解美国民众对电费上涨的担忧，他承诺的协议可能下周达成。他称已与科技公司达成“电价保护承诺”，要求其为数据中心建设或支付新电力设施费用。多家科技公司高管将出席3月4日的活动。

articles.title: US cybersecurity agency CISA reportedly in dire shape amid Trump cuts and layoffs
articles.description: Under the first year of the Trump administration, the U.S. cyber agency CISA has faced cuts, layoffs, and furloughs, as bipartisan lawmakers and cybersecurity industry sources say the agency is unprepared to handle a crisis.
articles.summary: 特朗普政府第一年，美国网络安全局CISA遭遇预算削减、裁员和停薪留职，两党议员和行业人士称其无法应对危机。

articles.title: Welcome to the post-hype crypto market
articles.description: Crypto is creeping back into the startup conversation, but at ETHDenver last week, the buzz was as much about Washington as it was about tokens. Policy shifts are rippling through the market as Tether and stablecoins face scrutiny, players like Stripe re-enter the conversation, and startups either find traction or flame out. The hype cycle is over, or at least taking a break. So what comes next?  On […]
articles.summary: 加密货币重新进入初创公司讨论，但ETHDenver会议上，华盛顿政策同样引发关注。监管变化影响市场，Tether和稳定币受审查，Stripe等公司重返市场，初创企业面临考验。炒作周期暂歇，未来如何发展值得关注。

articles.title: Here’s how the new Samsung Galaxy S26 compares with last year’s S25
articles.description: Samsung unveiled its Galaxy S26 lineup at its recent Unpacked event in San Francisco. As expected, the new series consists of the baseline S26, which starts at $899.99, and the bigger S26 Plus, which starts at $1,099.99. At the high end, there's also the $1,299.99 S26 Ultra, which is the largest in the lineup and comes with a bigger battery, better cameras, S Pen support, and expanded options for both storage and RAM. The price difference between Samsung's cheapest and most expensive S26 phones
articles.summary: 三星在旧金山的Unpacked活动中发布了Galaxy S26系列，包括S26、S26 Plus和S26 Ultra，价格从899.99美元到1299.99美元不等，配置和功能逐步升级。

articles.title: Alphabet-owned robotics software company Intrinsic joins Google
articles.description: Nearly five years after graduating into an independent Alphabet company, Intrinsic is moving under Google's domain.
articles.summary: 谷歌旗下公司Intrinsic在独立五年后重新回归谷歌体系。

articles.title: Riley Walz, the Jester of Silicon Valley, Is Joining OpenAI
articles.description: The software engineer is famous for his online stunts. Now he’s joining the company behind ChatGPT to work on new ways for humans to use AI systems.
articles.summary: 软件工程师因网络行为闻名，现加入ChatGPT开发公司，探索人类使用AI的新方式。

articles.title: Google and Samsung just launched the AI features Apple couldn’t with Siri
articles.description:
Google just announced that Gemini will soon be able to take care of some multistep tasks on your phone, like ordering food or hailing a car, starting first with the Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, and the just-announced Samsung Galaxy S26 phones. It all sounds a bit like features Apple announced for Siri way back at the 2024 Worldwide Developers Conference - before Apple delayed those planned features in March 2025 and which still aren't released.
Onstage, Sameer Samat, Google's president of Android, sh
articles.summary: 谷歌宣布Gemini将能处理手机上的多步骤任务，如订餐或打车，首批支持Pixel 10、Pixel 10 Pro和三星Galaxy S26。这与苹果2024年WWDC宣布的Siri功能类似，但苹果已推迟相关功能发布时间。

articles.title: Snapchat announces ‘The Snappys,’ its first-ever creator awards show
articles.description: Snapchat is the latest social media platform to launch awards for creators, joining TikTok and Instagram.
articles.summary: Snapchat推出创作者奖项，与TikTok和Instagram一同支持内容创作者。

articles.title: An accountant won a big jackpot on Kalshi by betting against DOGE
articles.description: A tax accountant saw Elon Musk fans bidding up a Kalshi prediction market and saw a sure bet to make easy money.
articles.summary: 税务会计师看到埃隆·马斯克粉丝推高Kalshi预测市场，认为这是轻松赚钱的确定性机会。

articles.title: Inside the story of the US defense contractor who leaked hacking tools to Russia
articles.description: The former boss of a U.S. hacking tools maker was jailed for selling highly sensitive software exploits to a Russian broker. This is how we first learned of his arrest, reported the story, and some of the unanswered questions we still have.
articles.summary: 前美国黑客工具公司老板因向俄罗斯中间商出售高敏感软件漏洞而入狱。此事件引发关注，但仍存未解疑问。

articles.title: Samsung shows off new display tech that adds a privacy screen to apps and notifications
articles.description: The new privacy tech uses different types of pixels to let you block certain apps and notifications from being viewed by others.
articles.summary: 新技术通过不同类型的像素，让你阻止他人查看某些应用和通知。

articles.title: Wearable startup CUDIS launches a new health ring line with an AI-fueled ‘coach’
articles.description: The wearable incentivizes healthy behavior with points that can be redeemed for health products.
articles.summary: 可穿戴设备通过积分激励健康行为，积分可兑换健康产品。

articles.title: Preorders for Samsung’s S26 phones come with up to $200 in gift cards
articles.description:
As expected, Samsung has taken the wraps off its flagship lineup for 2026. Introduced during the company's recent Unpacked event, the new Galaxy devices - which include the standard S26, the larger S26 Plus, and the high-end S26 Ultra - will be available on March 11th. Preorders are now open ahead of launch, with pricing starting at $899.99 for the base-model S26, $1,099.99 for the Plus, and $1,299.99 for the Ultra.
Overall, the forthcoming S26 lineup looks largely similar to last year's S25 ser
articles.summary: 三星揭晓了2026年旗舰系列，包括S26、S26 Plus和S26 Ultra，3月11日开售，起价899.99美元。整体设计与去年S25相似。

articles.title: Kalshi fined a MrBeast editor for insider trading on markets related to the YouTube star
articles.description: Kalshi fined the MrBeast editor, Artem Kaptur, over $20,000.
articles.summary: Kalshi对MrBeast编辑阿列克谢·卡普尔处以2万多元罚款。

articles.title: The public opposition to AI infrastructure is heating up
articles.description: Public backlash over the data center boom is leading to a variety of draconian policies — including bans on new construction.
articles.summary: 数据中心热潮引发公众反对，导致多种严苛政策出台，包括禁止新建项目。

articles.title: OpenClaw Users Are Allegedly Bypassing Anti-Bot Systems
articles.description: An open source project called Scrapling is gaining traction with AI agent users who want their bots to scrape sites without permission.
articles.summary: 开源项目Scrapling受到希望让机器人未经许可抓取网站的AI代理用户欢迎。

articles.title: Waymo to begin testing in Chicago and Charlotte
articles.description: Waymo this week will begin mapping and collecting data in Chicago and Charlotte. The move comes as Waymo announces it is currently operating its robotaxis fully autonomously in 10 US cities.
articles.summary: Waymo将在芝加哥和夏洛特开始地图绘制和数据收集，同时宣布其无人驾驶出租车已在10个美国城市实现完全自动驾驶。

articles.title: The AirPods Pro 3 Are $20 Off
articles.description: It's not the flashiest deal, but if you need a new pair of our favorite earbuds for iPhone owners, you can snag them at a slight discount.
articles.summary: 需要为iPhone用户更换新耳机的用户可以以小幅折扣购买。

articles.title: Kalshi says it fined a MrBeast editor and a politician for insider trading
articles.description:
Kalshi, the prediction betting market, has disclosed its first fines for insider trading, as reported earlier by The Wall Street Journal. In addition to handing down a $20,000 fine to a MrBeast editor, Kalshi also charged a California gubernatorial candidate over $2,000 after a video on X "appeared to show him trading on his own candidacy."
In a notice on Wednesday, Kalshi claims MrBeast editor Artem Kaptur traded about $4,000 on YouTube streaming markets, violating its insider trading rules. "O
articles.summary: Kalshi对内幕交易开出首张罚单，包括对MrBeast编辑罚款2万美元及一名加州州长候选人超2000美元。其指控称该编辑在YouTube市场违规交易。

articles.title: Gemini can now automate some multi-step tasks on Android
articles.description: Gemini on Android will be able to automate tasks involving rideshare requests, or grocery or food delivery, says Google.
articles.summary: 谷歌表示，Android上的Gemini将能够自动化网约车请求、杂货或食品配送等任务。

articles.title: Google Gemini can book an Uber or order food for you on Pixel 10 and Galaxy S26
articles.description:
Gemini can now prep a rideshare or grocery order, though you’ll have to submit the order yourself. | Image: Google	

Google's Gemini AI is getting one step closer to being more like an actual assistant. Starting with some Pixel 10 phones and the Samsung Galaxy S26 series, Gemini will be able to hail an Uber or put together a DoorDash order on its own.
It's called task automation, and it starts with a prompt to Gemini - something like "Get me an Uber to the Palace of Fine Arts." Gemini then launc
articles.summary: Gemini AI可自主处理打车和外卖订单，需用户下达指令。其任务自动化功能将逐步应用于部分Pixel 10和三星S26手机。

articles.title: Gemini Can Now Book You an Uber or Order a DoorDash Meal on Your Phone. Here’s How It Works
articles.description: Starting with the Samsung Galaxy S26, Google’s Gemini can automate tasks in popular mobile apps. We got a live demo of the new feature in action.
articles.summary: 从三星Galaxy S26开始，Google的Gemini可在热门移动应用中自动化任务。我们现场演示了该功能。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26+, and S26 Ultra: Specs, Features, Price, Release Date
articles.description: Samsung’s new phones all get AI enhancements, and the flagship Galaxy S26 Ultra has a Privacy Display that can block the screen from nosy neighbors.
articles.summary: 三星新手机均配备AI升级，旗舰机Galaxy S26 Ultra配备隐私显示屏，可防止旁人窥视。

articles.title: Micron joins the 3GB GDDR7 party, introduces 36 Gbps modules for GPUs — lags behind speeds of Samsung and SK Hynix
articles.description: Micron officially introduces its own 3GB GDDR7 memory module, with an official bandwidth rating of 36 Gbps.
articles.summary: 美光正式推出3GB GDDR7内存模块，官方带宽为36 Gbps。

articles.title: OpenAI COO says ads will be ‘an iterative process’
articles.description: COO Brad Lightcap noted that ads can add to the product experience of users if they are done right. He urged to give OpenAI a few months to see how the company fares in rolling out the product.
articles.summary: Brad Lightcap表示，恰当的广告可以提升用户体验，他建议给OpenAI几个月时间观察其产品推广情况。

articles.title: OpenClaw creator’s advice to AI builders is to be more playful and allow yourself time to improve
articles.description: Peter Steinberger talks about the creation of his viral AI agent OpenClaw and how being more "playful" makes for a better way to learn AI coding.
articles.summary: 彼得·施坦贝格分享了他创造病毒式AI代理OpenClaw的经历，并探讨了更加“玩乐”的方式如何提升AI编程学习效果。

articles.title: A White House Staffer Appears to Run Massive Pro-Trump X Account
articles.description: A popular right-wing account that called a video depicting Barack and Michelle Obama as apes "a masterpiece" appears to be run by a White House staffer, according to records reviewed by WIRED.
articles.summary: 一份将奥巴马夫妇描绘为猿猴的视频称为“杰作”的右翼账号，据WIRED审查的记录显示，似乎由白宫工作人员运营。

articles.title: Inside Meta and AMD's $100 billion deal, and why AMD is giving up a slice of the company in return for GPU orders — Meta stays platform-agnostic as it develops AI compute strategy
articles.description: AMD and Meta's blockbuster deal could see the company signing away 10% of shares in the business to Meta. We examine why AMD is keen to secure AI hardware orders, and explore Meta's AI compute strategy.
articles.summary: AMD与Meta的重磅交易可能使其向Meta出让10%的股份。分析AMD寻求AI硬件订单的原因及Meta的AI计算策略。

articles.title: Have hard-won scaling lessons to share? Take the stage at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
articles.description: Apply to speak at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by April 17 for a chance to lead a roundtable or breakout session for 1,000 founders and investors. If you’ve built, backed, or operated inside high-growth startups, your experience could shape how the next wave of founders scales.
articles.summary: 申请在2026年TechCrunch创始人峰会发言，4月17日前提交可有机会主持圆桌或分组讨论，面向1000名创始人和投资者。有高增长初创企业经验者可分享经验，影响未来创业者发展。

articles.title: MAGA Is Raging Over the Epstein Files. But They’re Not Mad at Donald Trump
articles.description: Trump supporters are angry at the lack of arrests after the latest Epstein file dump but have targeted their ire at Kash Patel, Pam Bondi, and Steve Bannon rather than the president.
articles.summary: 特朗普支持者对最新埃普斯坦文件泄露后未有逮捕行动感到愤怒，但将怒火指向了卡什·帕特尔、帕姆·邦迪和斯蒂夫·班农，而非总统。

articles.title: Kalshi Suspended a California Politician and a YouTuber for Insider Trading
articles.description: Leading prediction market Kalshi has revealed details of two recent insider trading cases it flagged to authorities, giving a rare look at how the platform enforces its policies.
articles.summary: Kalshi平台披露两起内部交易案例，展示其政策执行机制。

articles.title: Microsoft clarifies Windows 11 printer driver policy — support for legacy printers is not ending
articles.description: Microsoft confirmed today that Windows 11 is not ending support for legacy V3 and V4 printer drivers despite previous reports
articles.summary: 微软确认，尽管此前有报道，Windows 11仍将继续支持旧版V3和V4打印机驱动程序。

articles.title: German auto exports to China down 50% from 2022 levels
articles.description:
China is Germany's most significant global trade partner, but automotive exports are suffering as the Chinese industry ascends. By Will Girling
The post German auto exports to China down 50% from 2022 levels appeared first on Automotive World.
articles.summary: 中国是德国最重要的全球贸易伙伴，但随着中国汽车产业崛起，德系汽车出口下滑50%。

articles.title: Visual imitation learning: Guidde trains AI agents on human 'expert video' instead of documentation
articles.description:
For years, the "last mile" of digital transformation has been littered with forgotten PDFs and ignored training manuals. 
Organizations spend millions on sophisticated software like SAP or Salesforce, only for employees to struggle with basic navigation. Now, as the era of agentic AI arrives, companies face a double-edged sword: they must teach human employees to collaborate with AI, while simultaneously teaching AI agents to navigate the labyrinthine interfaces of the modern enterprise. 
One id
articles.summary: 企业需同时培训员工与AI协作，以及让AI适应复杂的企业系统，面临双重挑战。

articles.title: China to increase leading-edge chip output by 5x in two years, report claims — aims to lift 7nm and 5nm production to 100,000 wafers per month, targeting half a million monthly by 2030
articles.description: Chinese foundries looking to increase 7nm and below capacity to 100,000 wafer starts per month in one or two years, says Nikkei.
articles.summary: 日本媒体报道，中国铸造厂计划一到两年内将7纳米及以下产能提升至每月10万片晶圆。

articles.title: Newegg’s 25th anniversary sale is here, unlocking huge discounts on gaming PCs, laptops, RAM, SSDs, and more — jaw-dropping Doorbuster deals include a rare RTX 5070 at MSRP and an iFixit toolkit for under $10
articles.description: To celebrate Newegg's 25th anniversary, the retailer is releasing some epic Doorbuster deals at 9 am PT, with huge discounts on a range of tech.
articles.summary: 为庆祝新egg成立25周年，零售商将在太平洋时间上午9点推出重磅促销活动，提供多种科技产品的大幅折扣。

articles.title: Integrating eFPGA for Hybrid Signal Processing Architectures
articles.description:
Fixed logic or software? eFPGA offers a smarter middle ground—enabling reconfigurable, ASIC-class signal processing without the re-spin. Here's how to architect it.
The post Integrating eFPGA for Hybrid Signal Processing Architectures  appeared first on EE Times.
articles.summary: eFPGA提供更智能的中间方案，实现可重构的ASIC级信号处理，无需重新设计。如何构建此类架构？
